title: STARTDOCUMENT
text: STARTDOCUMENT Generates the beginning of the document, optionally with the XML version header. Explain this code STARTDOCUMENT (in: ADDXMLDECL Boolean) Copy Parameters Table 1. STARTDOCUMENT parameters Parameter Data Type Direction Description ADDXMLDECL Boolean IN Indicates whether to start the document with the header <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> ; Return Values Values returned: 0 Success –1 Failure. No text is added to the XML document by the operation. Description This operation must be called before any other operation on the UXMLWRITER instance. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
